description: Phase 4.1 package/installer tool coverage — confirms Phase 4.1 tools are included in adapter package file list
required_false_rationale: Phase 4.1 tools are marked required=false because the adapter package can function without them (pre-4.1 installs still work). Lock tooling is optional but recommended.

package_builder_path_dependency.impact: Package builder must be pointed at TCE repo, not standalone repo, to build a package
package_builder_path_dependency.fix_needed: Accept standalone repo root as alternative to TCE nested path
package_builder_path_dependency.severity: medium — does not block Phase 4.1 verification but blocks standalone packaging

runtime_bundle_impact.note: New-HeliosRuntimeBundle.ps1 builds the Helios runtime bundle from the same source tree
runtime_bundle_impact.rationale: Lock tools belong in the adapter package (source-of-truth), not the runtime bundle (vendored copy). The runtime bundle contains hooks, policy, and bridge — not tooling.
runtime_bundle_impact.install_plan_awareness: New-HeliosCombinedInstallPlan.ps1 generates plans from both packages. Lock tools would be installed from the adapter package side.

test_execution_status.Test-HeliosAdapterPackage: not_executed — requires built package from TCE path (package builder path dependency)

result: PARTIAL_PASS — all 6 Phase 4.1 tools + 1 schema + 2 docs added to package file list; package builder path dependency deferred to Phase 5
